name: preuser-plugins
description: preuser's Claude Code plugins — set up and rescue repo PR checks, author journeys, wire deployed previews, and seal credentials for the AI user.

plugins.name: preuser
plugins.description: Set up and triage preuser on a repo: /preuser:setup writes .preuser/config.yml targets and journeys; /preuser:status checks GitHub App connector visibility; /preuser:validate checks shape; /preuser:seal encrypts login values; /preuser:rescue diagnoses config, deploy handoff, reachability, auth, and run evidence; /preuser:feedback sends consented setup pain reports.
